.status-bar.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, rgb(221, 221, 221) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 20px 20px padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
